song.title: Hosanna
song.author: Carl Tuttle
song.lyrics: [V1] . G D Hosanna, Hosanna, . Em7 C D Hosanna in the highest! . G D Hosanna, Hosanna, . Em7 C D Hosanna in the highest! [C] .C D G Lord we lift up Your name .C D G With hearts full of praise. .C D G D/F# Em7 Be exalted oh Lord my God! . C D G Hosanna in the highest! [V2] .G D Glory, Glory, .Em7 C D Glory to the King of Kings! .G D Glory, Glory, .Em7 C D Glory to the King of Kings!
